Events
at NIST

Advancing Science,
Driving Innovation

Featured Events

Artificial Intelligence for Materials Science (AIMS) 2026

Jun 16 2026

2026 NIST-University Research Summit

Jun 30 2026

June Tour for NIST's 125th Anniversary

Jun 30 2026

Additive Construction – The Path to Standardization Continues

Jul 29 2026

Safeguarding Health Information: Building Assurance through HIPAA Security 2026

Sep 2 2026

Tell Me More

Additional Resources
Conference Attendee FAQ
Campus Information
Hosting at NIST

What will you do at a NIST conference?

  • Share ground breaking research, exchange critical knowledge, foster innovation, and advance measurement science, standards, and technology.
  • Build relationships with experts, researchers, policymakers, and industry leaders from all around the world.
  • Identify new ideas and resources to drive U.S. innovation, industrial competitiveness, and technological advancement.
  • Find collaborators to help solve pressing scientific and technological challenges.
